title: Polymarket Price Canary Input (Dry-Run by Default; Gated Live Canary)
description: By default (dry_run absent or true) this build makes ZERO network calls, exactly as before -- only GET /prices-history (single-market form) is ever planned; /batch-prices-history is never used. A gated live-canary mode (Python urllib) exists behind dry_run=false + live_canary_enabled=true + acknowledge_not_p1_evidence=true. A SEPARATE, mutually-exclusive gated transport-isolation-canary mode (system curl) exists behind dry_run=false + transport_isolation_canary_enabled=true + acknowledge_transport_isolation_not_p1_evidence=true. Setting both live_canary_enabled and transport_isolation_canary_enabled to true in the same run is rejected before any request (STOP_APIFY_TRANSPORT_MODE_AMBIGUOUS). All gated output is diagnostic only and never P1 evidence -- see disclaimer_label on every row.

conditions.title: Fixed condition manifest (max 5)
conditions.description: 3-5 pre-selected conditions, one per nb_subclass where possible (dry-run planner). NOTE: the gated live-canary mode (see live_canary_enabled below) additionally requires EXACTLY 3 conditions, one each of UP_DOWN/OVER_UNDER/NAMED_OTHER, with no per-condition tolerance -- any problem hard-stops the whole live-canary run before any request. No fields are derived at runtime; decision_ts must be precomputed externally (e.g. first_trade_ts + 3600s).

nb_subclass.title: Named-binary subclass
nb_subclass.description: Named-binary subclass, as already classified upstream.

decision_ts.title: Decision timestamp
decision_ts.description: Timezone-aware ISO 8601 UTC timestamp, e.g. 2026-01-01T00:00:00Z. Precomputed externally; this Actor never derives it.

side_0_token_id.title: Side 0 token ID
side_0_token_id.description: String-safe decimal token id for outcome_index=0. Scientific notation is rejected.

side_1_token_id.title: Side 1 token ID
side_1_token_id.description: String-safe decimal token id for outcome_index=1. Scientific notation is rejected.

slug.title: Gamma slug
slug.description: Optional Gamma market/event slug, used only if fetch_gamma_metadata=true.

max_conditions.title: Condition cap for this run
max_conditions.description: Effective cap = min(this value, 5). The Actor halts with APIFY_GUARDRAIL_CONDITION_CAP_EXCEEDED before building any plan if conditions.length exceeds the effective cap. The hard ceiling of 5 cannot be raised via input.

fetch_gamma_metadata.title: Plan Gamma metadata lookups
fetch_gamma_metadata.description: If true, plans one Gamma metadata request per condition that supplies a slug.

gamma_lookup_type.title: Gamma lookup type
gamma_lookup_type.description: Which Gamma collection to query by slug.

gamma_base_url.title: Gamma API base URL
gamma_base_url.description: Base URL for Gamma metadata lookups.

clob_base_url.title: CLOB API base URL
clob_base_url.description: Base URL for CLOB /prices-history and current-shape endpoints.

fetch_clob_book_shape.title: Plan current-shape endpoint checks
fetch_clob_book_shape.description: If true, plans /book, /price, /midpoint, /spread requests per side token, for current-schema validation only. These are never used for a historical/decision-time conclusion.

price_history_window_seconds.title: Price-history window (+/- seconds around decision_ts)
price_history_window_seconds.description: Used to compute planned startTs/endTs for GET /prices-history.

fidelity.title: CLOB fidelity parameter
fidelity.description: Passthrough to the documented 'fidelity' query parameter. [ASSUMPTION - VERIFY against live Polymarket docs before any future live run.]

global_request_cap.title: Global planned-request cap
global_request_cap.description: Hard fail-fast ceiling on total planned request rows across the whole run. The Actor halts with APIFY_GLOBAL_REQUEST_CAP_EXCEEDED if the plan would exceed this, even though no calls are ever made in this build.

dry_run.title: Dry run (true = old safe path; false = attempt gated live canary)
dry_run.description: Default true: takes the unchanged dry-run path, zero network calls, exactly as before. Set to the literal JSON boolean false to ATTEMPT the gated live-canary path -- but that path immediately hard-stops (zero requests) unless live_canary_enabled=true AND acknowledge_not_p1_evidence=true are ALSO both set. This delivery does not authorize an actual live run regardless of these flags.

live_canary_enabled.title: [LIVE CANARY GATE 1 of 2] Explicitly enable live-canary mode
live_canary_enabled.description: Must be the literal JSON boolean true, together with acknowledge_not_p1_evidence=true and dry_run=false, or the run hard-stops before any request. Missing or false is the safe default.

acknowledge_not_p1_evidence.title: [LIVE CANARY GATE 2 of 2] Acknowledge this is not P1 evidence
acknowledge_not_p1_evidence.description: Must be the literal JSON boolean true, together with live_canary_enabled=true and dry_run=false, or the run hard-stops before any request. By setting this true you acknowledge that live-canary output is diagnostic only: it does not establish P0 coverage, does not overturn S1_SOURCE_NOT_VIABLE, and does not unblock P1. Missing or false is the safe default.

live_include_current_endpoint_check.title: [Live canary only] Include optional current-endpoint schema comparison
live_include_current_endpoint_check.description: Only relevant in live-canary mode. If true, adds up to 3 additional /book requests (one side per condition) purely for current-state schema comparison -- never historical, never a parsed_side_candidate_row. Total requests stay within the hard cap of 12 either way (6 mandatory, or 9 with this enabled). Must be false or absent for the transport-isolation-canary route.

transport_isolation_canary_enabled.title: [TRANSPORT-ISOLATION GATE 1 of 2] Explicitly enable the curl transport-isolation canary
transport_isolation_canary_enabled.description: Must be the literal JSON boolean true, together with acknowledge_transport_isolation_not_p1_evidence=true and dry_run=false, or the run hard-stops before any curl process. Mutually exclusive with live_canary_enabled=true (both true in the same run hard-stops with STOP_APIFY_TRANSPORT_MODE_AMBIGUOUS, before any request). Missing or false is the safe default. Output is transport/reachability evidence only -- no coverage or P1 conclusion, no automatic future-run authorization.

acknowledge_transport_isolation_not_p1_e.title: [TRANSPORT-ISOLATION GATE 2 of 2] Acknowledge this is not P1 evidence
acknowledge_transport_isolation_not_p1_e.description: Must be the literal JSON boolean true, together with transport_isolation_canary_enabled=true and dry_run=false, or the run hard-stops before any curl process. By setting this true you acknowledge that transport-isolation-canary output is diagnostic only: it does not establish P0 coverage, does not overturn S1_SOURCE_NOT_VIABLE, and does not unblock P1. Missing or false is the safe default.
